description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a simple, modern design. The tabletop is flat and smooth, with a dark finish on one side and a lighter natural wood finish on the other, suggesting a reversible or dual-tone surface. The table is supported by four straight, sturdy legs, each positioned at the corners for stability. There is a subtle horizontal apron beneath the tabletop, adding structural support and a touch of visual interest. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for both dining and work purposes in urban environments. No decorative elements or attached seating are visible, emphasizing its functional and minimalist aesthetic.
description: A rectangular wooden table with a dual-tone flat top and four straight legs, featuring a minimalist and sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark tabletop surface and the apron beneath, with all four legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the table and the lighter wood finish, with the tabletop's thickness visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the lighter tabletop surface and the apron, similar to the front but with a different top color.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the dark tabletop surface and the table's length, mirroring view 1 but with a darker finish.
